item.title: Repairs to the overhead wire near 8th and Corinth Station has been repaired. Red Line and Blue Line trains are resuming normal operations; however, it may take time to resume regular scheduled service. Thank you for your patience. - x.com
item.description: Repairs to the overhead wire near 8th and Corinth Station has been repaired. Red Line and Blue Line trains are resuming normal operations; however, it may take time to resume regular scheduled service. Thank you for your patience.  x.com
